title: Flat Irrational Torus Topology: Simultaneous Resolution of Low-ℓ Anomaly and Hubble Tension
description: Computational framework and data for the Flat Irrational Torus (IT³) cosmological model. This repository contains MCMC chains, analysis scripts, LaTeX manuscript sources, and publication figures supporting the claim that a compact flat topology with irrational aspect ratios can simultaneously address the low-ℓ CMB anomaly and Hubble tension without new physics beyond General Relativity.
